## Contribution Type
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] 🧠 New Skill
- [ ] 🤖 New Agent
- [ ] 🔄 New Workflow
- [ ] 🐛 Fix / improvement to existing template
- [ ] ⚙️ CLI / core code change

## Template ID
<!-- e.g. epam-angular-standards, react-query-patterns -->
`<id>`

## Description
<!-- What does this template teach the AI? Who benefits from it? -->

## Category
<!-- e.g. Frontend & UI / Quality (QA) / Security & Auth -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Frontmatter includes `name`, `description`, `category`, `contributed: true`
- [ ] Skills include `tokenBudget` (estimate: word count × 1.3)
- [ ] Template body is at least 400 characters
- [ ] At least one code example included
- [ ] Anti-patterns section included (for skills)
- [ ] Entry added to `packages/templates/registry.json`
- [ ] `studio validate` passes locally (run: `npm run build && node dist/cli.js validate`)
- [ ] Tested with `studio info <type> <id>` to verify it displays correctly

## How I Tested This
<!-- Describe how you verified the template works correctly with your IDE/AI -->
